subcodes.first_line: At all times have We been, and continue to be, afflicted with successive and continuous trials; yet notwithstanding this, through grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان ببلایای متواتره متوالیه مبتلا بوده و هستیم ولکن مع ذلک بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
